Dashboard starter

Ship the first real screen on day zero.

This is not a toy admin mockup. It is the first protected surface of a modular SaaS app, with auth, billing, email, and database boundaries already mapped out.

Open billing Open settings Send a test email

Why it matters

Clean foundations beat feature theater.

  • Composable modules DB, billing, deploy target, and dashboard shell are resolved intentionally.
  • AI-first repo shape Thin routes, clear boundaries, and generated manifests keep agent work predictable.
  • Verified output Smoke profiles exist so the starter stays real, not aspirational.
